# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

# Upstream Services
upstreams:
  - name: ms1
    url: http://ms1.example.com
  - name: ms2
    url: http://ms2.example.com

# Routes
routes:
  - name: route1
    path_handling: v0
    paths: /api/v1/*
    strip_path: false
    preserve_host: true
    upstream: ms1
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          - key_names: ["x-api-key"]
  - name: route2
    path_handling: v0
    paths: /api/v2/*
    strip_path: false
    preserve_host: true
    upstream: ms2
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          - key_names: ["x-api-key"]

# Plugins
plugins:
  - name: key-auth
    config:
      - key_names: ["x-api-key"]
